title: phlegmariurus echinatus
intro: Phlegmariurus echinatus, also known as the spiny forked polypody, is a species of fern in the family Lycopodiaceae. It is a type of vascular plant with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and prevent infections. In herbal preparations, Phlegmariurus echinatus is often used to make teas, infusions, and salves to treat conditions such as wounds, burns, and skin irritations.
